productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Windglass branch-neutral rejoin release cue
lastRefinementUnit.result: Windglass now turns either settled branch score into one cyan high-build release, with authored upward lift and lateral damping carrying physical input reliably into original anchor-11 through existing release and feedback owners.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Windglass-to-anchor-11 hero release refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: Both the 134-speed safe line and 175-cargo shortcut now resolve their Windglass settle into one readable cyan release-ready cue, authored upward launch, bounded lateral damping, physical re-grapple, and secured original anchor-11 without a new state, timer, control, event type, material, entity, effect pool, or feedback owner.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright physically completed safe and shortcut routes through their scores, cyan release, and original anchor-11, proved real failure, keyboard retry, and Advanced closed/open/closed, held 69 DOM nodes, one canvas, 76 active-sector descriptors, 32 ledges, and 277 settled scene nodes, and reported zero console or page errors. Human View passed the first screen, both cyan-ready and release frames, both secured frames, failure, and recovery with diagnostics closed. The matched 60-tick warm-up plus 180-tick active window changed from 61.40 to 66.18 ms average tick, 16.29 to 15.11 simulated FPS, and 98.70 to 84.80 ms p95; the primary metric remained inside the 10 percent budget, counts stayed bounded through 360 further active ticks, and heap stabilized near 26.35 MB.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Validation complete; Experiments production publication is pending. ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Let original anchor-11 answer the secured cyan release with one short score-preserving rebound and confirmation beat, reusing windglass-rejoin-secured, tether, camera, player-scale, spark, and synth owners without another state or control.
